item.title: Today is my 5 year anniversary of being in remission of stage 4 cancer. The picture is me during chemo, and 1 year after.
item.dc:creator: MouseMyth

item.title: Some bottom shelf memes to wake you up.
item.description:
Even when I was told I wasn't looking at a lake, I was still convinced this was lake.
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
My algorithm thinks I should buy this sweatshirt, but I think I should paint this in my house actually.
You've reached the bottom of the dump.
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Lethal Company, Red Dead Redemption 2, Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Barotrauma, Minecraft, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Still unsure about the server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
Here's some Taxi Bear tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Sir Anthony Hopkins watches as Andre Rieu's Orchestra plays the Waltz he wrote 50 years ago. Sir Anthony Wife contacted Rieu and shared the sheet Music nearly 50-years old composition. Legendary Welsh actor Sir Anthony Hopkins is a Pianist and composer.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Suck it, Tax jerks!
item.description:
It took the CRA (we're in Canada) the better part of a year to do the audits and they withheld money from our tax returns in the meantime. Not only did we get more than that back on the last one, we got a bit more back on this one PLUS INTEREST. Yeah, I'm petty. But I also feel fucking vindicated. I've lost sleep over this. It was never a question of wrongdoing. It was because we netfile that they wanted the proof of what we were claiming. It just took them nine months to look at it and we couldn't really afford to wait for the money they were sitting on because my husband works in the film industry and was affected by the strike, and I only work part-time because I'm about to have my second discectomy at the beginning of February. So I just wanted to share a big ol' WOOHOO now that the audits are over... just in time for Tax Season 2024 lol
Here's the reason we get up and go to work. Holy shitballs, I'm so happy I could plotz.
item.dc:creator: ImmortalChild

item.title: Asher Perlman comix
item.description: From his site: https://ashermaxperlman.com/ “I am an Emmy-nominated, WGA award-winning, Peabody-award winning comedian, writer, actor, cartoonist, and hyphen-hunting multi-hyphenate. I am currently a writer/performer for The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, a cartoonist at The New Yorker, and a performer with the Improvised Shakespeare Company. I also perform all around New York City as myself.”

item.title: No one should die alone
item.description: Anyone have experience with this? I'm autistic and have a somewhat muted reaction to death (until someone hugs me or asks if I'm okay and my brain goes ! I'm supposed to act sad!) so I'm not sure if that would work for/against me I also have mental health issues... but death has never been something to break me.

item.title: So I hit a fucking hawk...
item.description:
So as you can tell by the video, I hit a fucking hawk. Thought he was a goner! Pulled over on the side of the road got him out of my ladder rack on my work truck. Brought him into my truck to keep him warm until the cities animal control could come.
After over an hour of waiting I came back out to my truck after completing a job that I was heading to. I opened my door and find out he is standing up!
I was scouring the internet trying to find a more immediate response than the city was able to provide. I found a local non-profit called raptors Incorporated that were able to assist me. I brought the hawk to my house and waited for them to arrive. They showed up within an hour of me calling them!
This all happened a couple of days ago. I got an update today! They said he is doing well! They are working on getting him to eat real food. He suffered a mild head injury. They were unable to detect any fractures by hand but they are going to perform further tests. When the weather warms up in the following weeks they are going to see if he is able to fly and hunt on his own! And hopefully return him to the wild! Raptors are a crucial part of our ecosystem. Especially in city and urban areas. As their habitat has been destroyed and taken over by concrete trees . they often come face to face with the front of a vehicle. If you can help it do everything you can to save an animal that is struck by a vehicle. Of course always be careful when pulling over on a highway. Do your due diligence to be sure that you are safe. RAPTOR Inc. (513) 825-3325 https://g.co/kgs/Jvp3Hfu This is a link to the company that came to his rescue! So glad there are companies like this out there to save our natural predators and other wildlife!
item.dc:creator: justpullnpray

item.title: Putin’s EU Puppet Is About To Have His Strings Cut
item.description:
https://x.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/1748066577306493247?s=20
https://x.com/nexta_tv/status/1748266449519399106?s=20 The EU withheld funding to Hungary after Vic’s corrupt meddling with the courts. In retaliation, and to do his daddy Putin’s bidding, he blocked the massive military aide package to Ukraine. So now he’s about to have his voting privileges revoked. Note that even before this vote was taken, he backed down once he got wind of what was about to happen. But bastards like him can’t be shown any mercy or leniency, at all. Take them away and don’t give them back until Hungary pulls its finger out and elects someone else. Or leaves. Whatever they want, the decision is their’s, but no more Putin insiders fucking around.
item.dc:creator: Thelrishlnquistion

item.title: I'm in this photo and I don't like it.

item.title: In light of the DOJs report
item.description:
Many a brave Sir Robin (and a Maid Marian) ran away that day. Easy to do when the sound of children screaming in abject terror muffled their footsteps. But let's not change the fact that their actions saved lives - their own - and for that I say they we promote them all. They deserve it. I hope that other law enforcement agencies learn from their example. I REALLY should have made this into a postcard.
Another take on it.
Wow. . .I never looked at it from their perspective. I am so glad they are safe. Who wants to go halfies on a pink and purple ribbon?
item.dc:creator: Moooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo
